overall.description: First-person exploration of a grand Gothic-style common room from a video game (Hogwarts Legacy), featuring ornate vaulted ceilings with celestial blue motifs, a large central spiral staircase, and students relaxing on furniture. The camera moves smoothly from a dim corridor through an archway into a bright main hall and ascends a spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow corridor leading to arched entrance

events.description: passing through the stone archway from the dim corridor into the bright main hall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down a narrow corridor toward a brightly lit archway

entered.detail: polished wooden floorboards running the length of the corridor
large Gothic stone archway framing the entrance to the main hall
wooden bulletin board covered with papers and wanted posters
blue house banner hanging on the stone wall
simple wooden bench against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dimly lit narrow corridor with wooden floors and stone walls. The camera moves forward toward a bright archway, passing a notice board and blue banner on the right, before transitioning through the stone archway into the main hall.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand common room with domed celestial ceiling

events.description: turning slightly right to navigate around the central seating area
passing behind a large couch where two students are seated

agents.ego_description: walking through the main common room, observing the architecture and other occupants

notable_agents.action: two students in dark robes sitting on a couch conversing
student sitting alone on a couch near the piano

entered.detail: ornate domed ceiling painted deep blue with gold constellation patterns
large circular blue carpet with gold astrological symbols
tall mechanical armillary sphere structure in the center of the room
elegant spiral staircase with ornate metal railings
tall pointed arch windows with intricate tracery letting in natural light
green wooden desk cluttered with papers and books
black grand piano against the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges into a magnificent circular common room with a high domed ceiling painted with celestial motifs. The space features a large blue constellation carpet, a central mechanical astrolabe structure, and students relaxing on couches. The camera navigates around the central seating area, passing by students and furniture while approaching the spiral staircase.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral staircase ascending to upper balcony

events.description: beginning to ascend the spiral staircase

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral staircase, looking up at the glass dome skylight above

entered.detail: intricate wrought iron railing with Gothic patterns lining the staircase
wooden balcony overlooking the main hall from above
large circular glass skylight at the apex of the dome

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches and begins ascending the spiral staircase, transitioning from the open common room floor to the elevated structure. The view shifts to look up at the ornate metal railings and the glass dome skylight above, while the main hall floor recedes below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dim, enclosed corridor into a vast, celestial-themed common room that culminates in an ascent toward a glass dome. It begins by moving forward through a narrow hallway of stone and wood, passing a notice board and blue banner before transitioning through a bright stone archway. As the camera emerges, the space opens into a magnificent circular hall featuring a constellation-painted domed ceiling, a large blue carpet, and students relaxing around a central mechanical astrolabe. The scene then shifts from the open floor as the camera navigates past the seating area and approaches a spiral staircase. Finally, the perspective ascends the stairs, moving away from the receding hall floor to look up through ornate metal railings toward the light of the glass skylight above.
